EXTENSION.JMCMODLIB.CONFIG.LogConsole.ca: When disabled, new game logs are no longer written to the log window cache.
EXTENSION.JMCMODLIB.CONFIG.LogConsole.ui: Automatically show the log window after the mod finishes initialization.
EXTENSION.JMCMODLIB.CONFIG.LogConsole.ca: Import current game log on startup
When enabled, the log window imports lines already written to the current game log before this mod loaded.
Maximum KB to read from the end of the current game log. Long logs only import their tail.
EXTENSION.JMCMODLIB.CONFIG.LogConsole.ui: Responds to the JmcModLib key binding and optional Ctrl+Shift+L / Ctrl+Alt+L legacy shortcuts.
Change this through the JmcModLib key binding. Defaults to F10; Ctrl+Shift+L / Ctrl+Alt+L remain available as legacy shortcuts.
When enabled, Ctrl+Shift+L and Ctrl+Alt+L still work even if the main hotkey is not set to L.
Attempts to disable Root Viewport subwindow embedding so the log window becomes a real system window. Turn this off if other game popups behave oddly.
Display used the first time the log window opens. If the selected display no longer exists, it falls back to the game window display.
Writes display enumeration and log window state to the game log to help troubleshoot multi-display, DPI, and native-window issues.
EXTENSION.JMCMODLIB.CONFIG.LogConsole.ca: Only saves and displays new log lines at or above this level. It cannot capture logs already filtered out by the game Logger.
Maximum number of recent log lines retained by the log window.
EXTENSION.JMCMODLIB.CONFIG.LogConsole.fo: Show the timestamp for each log line in the log body.
Show log levels such as Info, Warn, and Error in the log body.
EXTENSION.JMCMODLIB.CONFIG.LogConsole.ui: Used by titles, buttons, filter boxes, and other UI controls. Separate names with semicolons; Godot uses the first available font and allows system fallback.
Used by the log body. Put monospace fonts first. Separate names with semicolons; Godot uses the first available font and allows system fallback.
Automatically calculates log and UI font sizes from the log window size, current screen resolution, and DPI. When disabled, manual sizes below are used.
Overall multiplier applied on top of automatic font sizing. If text feels small on 4K displays, try 1.10 or 1.20.
Used when automatic font scaling is disabled.
Used when automatic font scaling is disabled. You may want a larger value on high-DPI displays.
Automatically chooses the first-open log window size from the current screen size. When disabled, the manual width and height below are used.
Overall multiplier applied to the automatic window size.
Used when automatic default window sizing is disabled. After resizing, the current size is kept for this game session.
Used when automatic default window sizing is disabled. After resizing, the current size is kept for this game session.
Extra line spacing for the log body.
EXTENSION.JMCMODLIB.CONFIG.LogConsole.bu: Open or close the log window
EXTENSION.JMCLOGCONSOLE.UI.WINDOW_TITLE: Jmc Log Console - ログウィンドウ
EXTENSION.JMCLOGCONSOLE.UI.HEADER_TITLE: Jmc Log Console  ログウィンドウ
EXTENSION.JMCLOGCONSOLE.UI.NO_LOGS: ログはまだありません。
EXTENSION.JMCLOGCONSOLE.UI.NO_MATCHES: 一致するログはありません。
EXTENSION.JMCMODLIB.CONFIG.LogConsole.ui: ログフォントのアンチエイリアス
Controls how font outlines align to the pixel grid. Light is usually more natural; Normal may be sharper.
ログフォントのヒンティング
Controls glyph layout at subpixel positions. If text looks blurry or unstable, try Disabled or Auto.
Multiplies the current DPI-based font sampling rate. Higher values may smooth text, but increase font texture cost.
ログフォントのサンプリング倍率
Antialiasing mode for the log body font. LCD can be sharper, but may show color fringes with screenshots or non-standard scaling.
ログフォントのサブピクセル配置
